evidence_refs: CT-1: src/brand/styles/components.css applies the brandbook-derived theme tokens to app-shell and the placeholder-screen. CT-1 made the placeholder legible on light by switching .eyebrow to the contrast-safe --theme-accent-text (#006080 on light) and .placeholder-screen p:last-child to the theme-aware --theme-text-muted (was the always-light --theme-component-text-muted). Verified eyebrow rgb(0,96,128) and paragraph rgba(21,21,22,0.68) on /home light.
